title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Anthropic published guidance on making Claude Code work effectively in large codebases, emphasizing that the harness around the model matters more than the model itself. Cole Medin demonstrates a complete implementation of this harness, called the AI Layer, including CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and plugins.
